project.name: Stratos Office
project.description: Private, browser-only AI office assistant running Gemma 4 E2B entirely in-browser via WebGPU. No server. No API keys. No data leaves your device.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.description: Root HTML mount. Loads Google Fonts (Outfit, Material Symbols), OG meta tags, and mounts src/main.tsx

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.description: React entry point. createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(<App/>) in StrictMode

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.description: Root component. Wraps everything in ModelProvider → TaskProvider → AppContent. Routes pages by model stage (idle→Landing, downloading→Loading, ready→Dashboard). Renders TopBar, Sidebar, footer, HistoryDrawer, SettingsDrawer.

nodes.name: ModelContext
nodes.description: Manages Web Worker lifecycle. Holds GPU adapter info, download progress, retry state, tps. Exposes loadModel(), resumeDownload(), generate(), interrupt(), reset(), clearError(). Communicates with worker.js via postMessage.

nodes.name: TaskContext
nodes.description: Manages active task execution. Holds activeTask, taskInput, lifecycle, streamingOutput, finalOutput, parsedOutput. Exposes selectTask(), setInput(), submitTask(), cancelTask(), clearOutput(). Handles two-pass pipeline for meeting_minutes/voice_to_email.

nodes.name: LandingPage
nodes.description: Pre-load hero UI. Shows 'Load Gemma 4' CTA, feature highlights, privacy messaging. Displayed when stage is idle/checking/unsupported.

nodes.name: LoadingPage
nodes.description: Download/load progress UI. Shows progress bar, file name, ETA, GPU info. Handles download_retry and download_error states with resume button.

nodes.name: DashboardPage
nodes.description: Main workspace hub after model is ready. Shows 9 quick-start cards, then all 32 tasks organized into 6 category grids. Routes to category-specific workspace when a task is selected.

nodes.name: SettingsDrawer
nodes.description: Slide-in settings panel (max 360px). Sections: Model Info, Performance (GPU/backend/TPS), Storage, Privacy (Offline Mode toggle), Web Search (TinyFish key management), AI Behavior (Thinking Mode default), Appearance (Dark/Light theme), Maintenance (Clear Model Cache).

nodes.name: HistoryDrawer
nodes.description: Slide-in history panel. Loads all TaskEntry[] from IndexedDB, sorted by timestamp desc. Each entry shows task type icon, input summary, output preview, timestamp.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.description: Left navigation (280px desktop, full-width mobile drawer). 6 collapsible category accordions containing 32 task items. Bottom buttons for History and Settings. Research category hidden when Offline Mode is active.

nodes.name: TopBar
nodes.description: Fixed top header. Shows 'Stratos Office' title, settings gear icon, mobile hamburger. Height: 56px mobile, 64px desktop.

nodes.name: TaskWorkspace
nodes.description: Generic task workspace shell. Split pane layout: InputPanel (left 50%) + OutputPanel (right 50%) + ThinkingModeToggle. Used by DocumentsWorkspace, TextWorkspace.

nodes.name: AudioWorkspace
nodes.description: Audio task workspace. Renders TaskWorkspace + AudioRecorderWidget for live mic capture.

nodes.name: VisualWorkspace
nodes.description: Visual task workspace. Renders TaskWorkspace + WebcamCapture for camera input.

nodes.name: ResearchWorkspace
nodes.description: Research task workspace. Renders TaskWorkspace + WebSearchSetupPrompt if TinyFish is not connected.

nodes.name: PrivacyWorkspace
nodes.description: Privacy task workspace. Renders TaskWorkspace with PrivacyNotice + DisclaimerBanner for medical/legal/financial tasks.

nodes.name: InputPanel
nodes.description: Task input controls. Conditionally renders: FileUploadZone, AudioRecorderWidget, WebcamCapture, textarea, question input, PDFPageRangeSelector, TokenEstimateDisplay, ContextLimitWarning, PrivacyNotice, Submit button. Dynamically activates UI based on TaskConfig requirements.

nodes.name: OutputPanel
nodes.description: Task output display. Conditionally routes to specialized renderers: MarkdownRenderer (text/markdown/table), JsonTreeView (json), HtmlPreviewFrame (html), DiffView (redline_comparison), BoundingBoxCanvas (object_detection). Shows StreamingOutput during generation. Includes Copy, Stop, Export buttons.

nodes.name: ExportButton
nodes.description: Exports task output. Creates Blob from output text and triggers download via <a> click. Formats: .txt, .json, .md, .html depending on outputFormat and parsedOutput.

nodes.name: HtmlPreviewFrame
nodes.description: Sandboxed iframe for wireframe_to_html output. Renders generated HTML in an isolated context via srcdoc attribute.

nodes.name: DiffView
nodes.description: Color-coded document diff for redline_comparison. Shows additions (green), deletions (red), modifications (blue) with commentary.

nodes.name: JsonTreeView
nodes.description: Collapsible JSON tree for structured task outputs (contract analysis, chart data, meeting minutes, etc.). Renders with indentation and type-colored values.

nodes.name: BoundingBoxCanvas
nodes.description: Canvas overlay for object_detection. Draws bounding boxes and labels over the original image using ObjectDetectionResult[] data.

nodes.name: MarkdownRenderer
nodes.description: Renders markdown output using react-markdown + remark-gfm (tables, strikethrough) + highlight.js (code blocks).

nodes.name: StreamingOutput
nodes.description: Live token-by-token streaming display. Shows TPS counter, blinking caret, and accumulates output in real-time during generation.

nodes.name: taskRouter.ts
nodes.description: Task routing engine. TASK_CONFIGS object (32 entries with metadata). buildTaskMessages() constructs message arrays with system prompts + multimodal content. getTokenBudget() returns per-task max_new_tokens.

nodes.name: prompts/*.ts
nodes.description: 6 prompt module files. documents.ts (8), visual.ts (6), audio.ts (5), text.ts (8), research.ts (2), privacy.ts (3). getPrompt() maps TaskType to category via dynamic template interpolation (supports {question}, {tone}, {language}, {searchResults}, {pageContent}).

nodes.name: outputParser.ts
nodes.description: Output parsing utilities. parseJSON() strips <think> blocks and markdown fences, finds first JSON object/array. extractText() strips think/fence blocks. markdownTableToJSON() and jsonToMarkdownTable() for table format conversion.

nodes.name: fileHandler.ts
nodes.description: File validation and extraction. validate() checks MIME type against task requirements + 50MB size limit. readAsDataURL() for images. extractAudio() uses Web Audio API to decode any format → 16kHz mono Float32Array. extractPDFText() uses pdfjs-dist. estimateTokens() heuristic (chars/4).

nodes.name: audioRecorder.ts
nodes.description: AudioRecorder class. getUserMedia({audio}) → MediaRecorder + AnalyserNode for live level meter. Records up to 30 min. Supports pause/resume. stop() decodes to 16kHz mono PCM Float32Array. Fires warning at 25 min.

nodes.name: webcamCapture.ts
nodes.description: WebcamCapture class. getUserMedia({video}) → OffscreenCanvas.captureFrame() → data URL. Used for image-capturing tasks (OCR, chart extract, wireframe, etc.).

nodes.name: worker.js
nodes.description: Gemma 4 inference Web Worker (398 lines). Handles: check (WebGPU/s-f16), load (download model), generate (simple prompt), task (multimodal task with streaming + two-pass). Loads Transformers.js from CDN. Uses InterruptableStoppingCriteria for cancellation.

nodes.name: mcpClient.ts
nodes.description: TinyFish MCP client. search() → GET api.search.tinyfish.ai?query= with X-API-Key header. fetchContent()/fetchMultiple() → POST api.fetch.tinyfish.ai with {urls, format:'markdown'}. In-memory caching (5min search, 15min fetch). McpAuthError/McpNetworkError classes. Timeout: 10s search, 15s fetch.

nodes.name: historyStore.ts
nodes.description: IndexedDB task history. Database: stratos-history, Store: entries, Index: timestamp. CRUD: addEntry(), getAllEntries(), deleteEntry(), clearAll(). Max 200 entries (oldest auto-evicted).

nodes.name: settingsStore.ts
nodes.description: localStorage settings. Key: stratos-settings. Fields: offlineMode (bool), thinkingModeDefault (bool), theme (dark|light). Also manages TinyFish API key in localStorage key stratos-tinyfish-key.

nodes.name: Cache API (Browser)
nodes.description: Browser Cache Storage API. Used by Clear Model Cache flow. caches.keys() → caches.delete(name) clears all cached model shards, forcing re-download on next load.

nodes.name: TinyFish API
nodes.description: External web search API. Two endpoints: api.search.tinyfish.ai (GET, search results) and api.fetch.tinyfish.ai (POST, page content extraction). Always HTTPS. Only called when research task is active and offlineMode=false.

nodes.name: WebGPU API
nodes.description: Browser WebGPU API. Used by Transformers.js for model inference on GPU. Requires shader-f16 feature for fp16 quantization. Coop/COEP headers required for SharedArrayBuffer support.

flows.label: Load Gemma 4
flows.description: Boot sequence: GPU check → model download → WebGPU init → ready

edges.annotation: check → loading → progress → ready (streamed via postMessage events)

flows.label: Run Document OCR
flows.description: Upload image → validate → build prompt → infer → parse → render text

edges.annotation: getPrompt('ocr') → 'Extract all text from the provided image...'
task_update streams output tokens → final string

flows.label: Run Web Research
flows.description: Query → TinyFish search + fetch → synthesize with citations

edges.annotation: shows textarea for query + WebSearchSetupPrompt if no API key
returns { title, url, snippet }[] → top 5 results
postMessage with system prompt containing sources
streams markdown with inline citation markers [1], [2]

flows.label: Record & Transcribe Meeting
flows.description: Live mic capture → PCM extraction → two-pass pipeline (transcript → minutes)

edges.annotation: getLevel() → live level meter (AnalyserNode frequency data)
audioData passed as Float32Array to buildTaskMessages()
Pass 1: postMessage({ type: 'task', pass: 1 }) → raw transcript
task_pass1_complete → transcript text returned to TaskContext
lifecycle==='complete' and output exists → ExportButton mounts
creates Blob with proper MIME type → <a> download click → file saved

flows.label: Configure Web Search
flows.description: Enter TinyFish API key → validate → persist in localStorage

edges.annotation: click settings icon → setSettingsOpen(true) → slide-in drawer
user enters API key → validateKey(key) → GET api.search.tinyfish.ai

flows.label: Toggle Offline Mode
flows.description: Disable all external MCP calls for air-gap privacy

edges.annotation: loadSettings().offlineMode → Research category hidden from nav
offlineMode=true → getApiKey() returns null → all calls short-circuit

flows.label: Review Task History
flows.description: Browse past 200 task runs from IndexedDB

edges.annotation: returns TaskEntry[] sorted by timestamp desc → renders as icon list

flows.label: Wireframe to HTML
flows.description: Sketch image → model generates → functional HTML in sandboxed iframe

edges.annotation: getPrompt('wireframe_to_html') → 'Return only HTML code in a code block'
streams HTML codeblock → extractText() extracts code

flows.label: Redline Document Comparison
flows.description: Two document versions → diff analysis with color-coded output

edges.annotation: two FileUploadZone instances for document versions
both pdfText strings → buildTaskMessages() compares them

flows.label: Clear Model Cache
flows.description: Delete cached model shards from browser Cache API

edges.annotation: next model load re-downloads all ~1-2GB from CDN

flows.label: Upload Audio & Transcribe
flows.description: Upload audio/video file → extract PCM → single-pass transcription

edges.annotation: FileUploadZone accepting audio + video MIME types
getPrompt('transcription') → 'Transcribe with speaker turns and timestamps'
postMessage({ type: 'task', messages }) with audio data

flows.label: Object Detection
flows.description: Image → model returns bounding boxes → canvas overlay

edges.annotation: getPrompt('object_detection') → 'Return JSON array of {label, confidence, bbox}'
overlays bounding boxes + labels on original image via canvas

flows.label: Contract Analysis
flows.description: PDF contract → risk summary, key clauses, flagged terms

edges.annotation: renders summary, clauses, risk flags with severity badges

tasks.label: Handwriting Transcription
tasks.desc: Convert handwritten notes to typed text

tasks.label: Contract Analyzer
tasks.desc: Risk summary, key clauses, flagged terms

tasks.label: Chart Extraction
tasks.desc: Extract data points from chart images

tasks.label: Whiteboard OCR
tasks.desc: Clean typed notes from whiteboard photos

tasks.label: Email Reply Drafts
tasks.desc: Three reply options with different tones

src/.App.tsx: Root component with page router + layout
src/.historyStore.ts: IndexedDB CRUD for task history (200 max)
src/.index.css: Tailwind v4 import + MD3 dark theme (50+ vars) + animations

src/types/.index.ts: All TypeScript interfaces (298 lines). ModelState, TaskType union, 12+ structured output types, WorkerMessage/Response

src/components/ui/.~20 components: FileUploadZone, AudioRecorderWidget, WebcamCapture, MarkdownRenderer, JsonTreeView, DiffView, BoundingBoxCanvas, HtmlPreviewFrame, ExportButton, MaterialIcon, PDFPageRangeSelector, TokenEstimateDisplay, ContextLimitWarning, ThinkingModeToggle, PrivacyNotice, DisclaimerBanner, StreamingOutput, Toast

src/test/.~16 test files: Unit + integration + bug regression tests (Vitest + jsdom + fake-indexeddb)

specs/pipeline-engine/.requirements.md: Pipeline engine spec — 8 user stories for future composable task chaining

stories: US-1: Pre-built pipeline templates (Meeting Intelligence, Due Diligence)
US-2: Drop folder of mixed files → auto-route through pipeline
US-3: Real-time step progress indicator with per-step streaming
US-4: Chain step N output as step N+1 input (text + JSON passthrough)
US-5: Custom pipeline builder (drag-and-drop task ordering, saved to localStorage)
US-6: Graceful partial failure (retry/skip/abort per step)
US-7: Export full pipeline as markdown/PDF/JSON

developer_notes.git_workflow: Direct commits to main, no PR workflow
storage: Browser Cache API for model shards
